---
title: "{recalc} vignette"
author: "Ian Hussey"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r include=FALSE}

# formatting options
# set default chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, 
                      warning = FALSE)

# disable scientific notation
options(scipen = 999) 

```

# Independent t test and Cohen's d from M/SD/N

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(roundwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstance)
# devtools::install_github("ianhussey/recalc")
library(recalc)

res <- independent_t_test_summary(
  m1 = 10.3,
  m2 = 8.7,
  sd1 = 3.1,
  sd2 = 2.8,
  n1 = 50,
  n2 = 48,
  d = 0.55,
  d_ci_lower = 0.20, # currently not used extensively
  d_ci_upper = 0.90, # currently not used extensively
  d_digits = 2,
  p = .0024,
  include_se_sd_confusion = FALSE
)

# res <- independent_t_test_summary(
#   m1 = 10.3,
#   m2 = 8.7,
#   sd1 = 3.1,
#   sd2 = 2.8,
#   n1 = 50,
#   n2 = 48,
#   direction = "m2_minus_m1"
# )

res

plot_multiverse_d(res)

plot_multiverse_p(res)

```

# Between two way anova

```{r}

m <- matrix(c(5.00, 2.69, 
              4.83, 5.54), 
            ncol = 2)

sd <- matrix(c(2.99, 2.57, 
               2.71, 1.84), 
             ncol = 2)

n <- matrix(c(40, 20, 
              35, 10), 
            ncol = 2)

res_2way_anova <- two_way_between_anova(
    means = m,
    sds = sd,
    ns = n,
    allow_input_rounding = TRUE,
    se_sd_confusion      = FALSE,
    ci_methods           = "wald"
)

res_2way_anova

```

# Between subjects 1 or 2 way ANOVA

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(roundwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstance)

labels <- c("groups 1 (A vs B)", "groups 2 (C vs D)", "groups 1 x groups 2 interaction")

m <- matrix(c(5.00, 2.69, 
              4.83, 5.54), 
            ncol = 2)

sd <- matrix(c(2.99, 2.57, 
               2.71, 1.84), 
             ncol = 2)

n <- matrix(c(40, 20, 
              35, 10), 
            ncol = 2)

# res_anova <- one_or_two_way_between_anova(
#   m = m,
#   sd = sd,
#   n = n,
#   F_est     = 4.32,   # if you have a reported F, otherwise leave NULL
#   df1_est   = 1,
#   df2_est   = 99,
#   p_est     = 0.041,
#   peta2_est = 0.065,
#   F_digits  = 2,
#   p_digits  = 3,
#   peta2_digits = 2
# )

# res_anova <- one_or_two_way_between_anova(
#   m = m,
#   sd = sd,
#   n = n,
#   show.t = FALSE,
#   dp.p = 2
# )

res_anova <- multiverse_anova_oneway(
    means = m,
    sds = sd,
    ns = n,
    allow_input_rounding = TRUE,
    se_sd_confusion      = FALSE,
    ci_methods           = "wald"
)

res_anova |>
  group_by(label) |>
  summarize(min_p = min(p),
            max_p = max(p),
            min_peta2_rounded = min(round_down(eta2_partial, 2)),
            max_peta2_rounded = max(round_down(eta2_partial, 2)))

res_anova |>
  arrange(p_unrounded, original) |>
  rownames_to_column(var = "rowname") |>
  mutate(rowname = as.numeric(as.character(rowname))) |>
  ggplot(aes(y = rowname,
             x = p_unrounded,
             color = original)) +
  geom_point()

```
